name: Suggested
description: Get suggested users to follow from Twitter/X

argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); const items = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="UserCell"]') || []; const results = []; for (const item of items) { if (results.length >= limit) break; const avatarContainer = item.querySelector('[data-testid^="UserAvatar-Container-"]'); const username = avatarContainer?.getAttribute('data-testid')?.replace('UserAvatar-Container-', '') || ''; if (!username) continue; const nameDiv = item.querySelector('div[dir="ltr"][class*="r-3s2u2q"]'); const name = nameDiv?.textContent || ''; const bioDiv = item.querySelector('div[dir="auto"][class*="r-1h8ys4a"]'); const bio = bioDiv?.innerText || ''; results.push({ username, name: name.trim(), bio: bio.trim(), url: 'https://x.com/' + username }); } return { results }; }
